basic_details.job_title: ICAR NBSSLUP Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 12 Technical Assistant, Lab Associate and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR National Bureau of Soil Survey and Land Use Planning
basic_details.post_name: Technical Assistant, Lab Associate and More
basic_details.short_information: ICAR National Bureau of Soil Survey and Land Use Planning (ICAR NBSSLUP) Recruitment 2026: ICAR National Bureau of Soil Survey and Land Use Planning is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 12 Various Positions posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation as per rules for ST/SC/OBC.

qualification.details: Remote Sensing and GIS consultant: Master's degree in Geoinformatics/RS&GIS with more than two years' experience. Lab associate: Master's Degree in Soil Science/Microbiology/Biochemistry with more than two years' experience. Domain Experts: M. Sc/M.Tech/Ph D in Data Science (AI & ML), Agril. Engg. Geo-Informatics, RS and GIS with more than three years of experience. Project Consultant: M Sc./Mtech/PhD (Agril. Engg. with specialization in Soil and Water Conservation Engineering/ Irrigation and Drainage Engineering/Soil Science/RS&GIS) More than two years experience for MSc/Mtech qualification. Experience in Crop simulation modelling/ Hydrological modelling as evident from publications. Project Associate: M.Sc (Agril) with specialization in Agronomy/Soil Science with work experience of two years. Field Assistant: B.Sc (Agril) /B.Tech (Agril. Engg). Technical Assistant: B.Sc/B.E./B.Tech in Engineering with drone operator license.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR NBSSLUP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ICAR NBSSLUP Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 20 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the ICAR NBSSLUP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies available for various positions in the ICAR NBSSLUP Recruitment 2026. These include roles like Remote Sensing and GIS consultant, Lab associate, and more.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for ICAR NBSSLUP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ICAR NBSSLUP Recruitment 2026. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the posts advertised by ICAR NBSSLUP?
faq.answer: The age limit for all the posts is between a minimum of 21 years and a maximum of 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules for SC/ST/OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for ICAR NBSSLUP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The mode of application for ICAR NBSSLUP Recruitment 2026 is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the positions in ICAR NBSSLUP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 65,000 per month, depending on the specific post and qualifications of the selected candidate.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview for ICAR NBSSLUP Recruitment 2026 be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Nagpur, Maharashtra, at the ICAR National Bureau of Soil Survey and Land Use Planning, with the pincode 440033.

faq.question: Q8. What are the essential qualifications required for the ICAR NBSSLUP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post, ranging from a Bachelor's degree in Agriculture Engineering or equivalent for Field Assistant to Master's or PhD degrees in specialized fields like Geoinformatics, Data Science, and Soil Science for other roles.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any online application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no online application process for this recruitment. Candidates are required to attend the walk-in interview directly with all necessary documents.
